other_works.title: Invoice Generator
other_works.description: Developed a Python-based invoice generation tool that creates professional PDF invoices from Excel source data and supporting evidence images stored in a folder. The solution automates document generation, organizes supporting attachments, and helps reduce manual formatting work for invoice preparation.

other_works.title: My Portfolio
other_works.description: Built a personal portfolio website with a premium dark UI to showcase projects, skills, career background, and development work in a polished modern interface. The site was developed using Next.js and TypeScript, with content structured for maintainability and presentation quality. I handled the AWS setup and deployment for this project myself using AWS Amplify, and I connected it to a GitHub-based CI/CD workflow for automated updates. It also includes an OpenAI-powered chatbot that answers portfolio-related questions in a more interactive and personalized way, reflecting a practical blend of frontend development, hands-on cloud deployment, and AI-assisted user experience design.
